setupTag.tagName: Parent write UTMs to session cookies

tag.name: Parent decorate URL link with _ga cookie name and value

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {

  // Get _ga client id
  function getGAClientId() {
    var cookies = document.cookie;
    var regex = /(?:_ga=)(?:GA\d\.\d\.)?([^;]*)/;
    var match = cookies.match(regex);
    if (match && match.length > 1) { return match[1]; } else { return null; }
  }
  var clientId = getGAClientId();

  // Define the named value pairs to decorate onto URLs
  var decorationPairs = [ { name: '_ga', value: clientId } ];

  if (decorationPairs.length === 0) return;

  // Extract hostname from a url string
  function getHostname(url) {
    var match = url.match(/^https?:\/\/([^/?#]+)/i);
    return match ? match[1].toLowerCase() : '';
  }

  // Check if hostname is in the permitted list
  var permittedHosts = [ 'www.pardot.com', 'www.hubspot.com' ];

  function isPermittedHost(url) {
    var hostname = getHostname(url);
    for (var i = 0; i < permittedHosts.length; i++) {
      if (hostname === permittedHosts[i]) return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  // Build query string from collected pairs
  function buildQueryString(pairs) {
    return pairs.map(function(p) {
      return encodeURIComponent(p.name) + '=' + encodeURIComponent(p.value);
    }).join('&');
  }

  // Parse existing query param names from a URL base (no fragment) into a lookup object
  function getExistingParamNames(base) {
    var existing = {};
    var qIdx = base.indexOf('?');
    if (qIdx !== -1) {
      var queryString = base.substring(qIdx + 1);
      queryString.split('&').forEach(function(part) {
        var eqIdx = part.indexOf('=');
        var paramName = eqIdx !== -1 ? part.substring(0, eqIdx) : part;
        if (paramName) {
          existing[paramName] = true;
          existing[decodeURIComponent(paramName)] = true;
        }
      });
    }
    return existing;
  }

  // Append pairs to a url, avoiding duplicates while preserving existing query params
  function decorateUrl(url, pairs) {
    if (!url || url === 'about:blank') return url;

    // Only decorate URLs from permitted hosts
    if (!isPermittedHost(url)) return url;

    var hashIdx = url.indexOf('#');
    var fragment = hashIdx !== -1 ? url.substring(hashIdx) : '';
    var base     = hashIdx !== -1 ? url.substring(0, hashIdx) : url;

    var existingParams = getExistingParamNames(base);
    var filtered = pairs.filter(function(p) {
      return !existingParams[p.name] && !existingParams[encodeURIComponent(p.name)];
    });

    if (!filtered.length) return url;
    var qIdx = base.indexOf('?');
    return base + (qIdx !== -1 ? '&' : '?') + buildQueryString(filtered) + fragment;
  }

  // Define element types and their url attributes to decorate
  var elementTargets = [
    { selector: 'iframe', attrs: ['src', 'data-src'] },
    { selector: 'a',      attrs: ['href'] },
    { selector: 'form',   attrs: ['action'] },
    { selector: 'area',   attrs: ['href'] },
    { selector: 'script', attrs: ['src'] },
    { selector: 'img',    attrs: ['src', 'data-src'] }
  ];

  // Iterate each element type and decorate matching url attributes
  for (var t = 0; t < elementTargets.length; t++) {
    var target   = elementTargets[t];
    var elements = document.querySelectorAll(target.selector);

    for (var j = 0; j < elements.length; j++) {
      var el = elements[j];

      for (var k = 0; k < target.attrs.length; k++) {
        var attr     = target.attrs[k];
        var original = el.getAttribute(attr);
        if (original) {
          var updated = decorateUrl(original, decorationPairs);
          if (updated !== original) el.setAttribute(attr, updated);
        }
      }
    }
  }

})();
</script>

tag.name: Parent decorate URL link with UTM names and values from cookies

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {

  // Extract all utm_* cookies
  var cookiePairs = [];
  var allCookies = document.cookie.split(';');

  for (var i = 0; i < allCookies.length; i++) {
    var cookie = allCookies[i].trim();
    var eqIdx = cookie.indexOf('=');
    if (eqIdx === -1) continue;

    var name  = decodeURIComponent(cookie.substring(0, eqIdx).trim());
    var value = decodeURIComponent(cookie.substring(eqIdx + 1).trim());

    if (name.indexOf('utm_') === 0) {
      cookiePairs.push({ name: name, value: value });
    }
  }

  if (cookiePairs.length === 0) return;

  // Extract hostname from a url string
  function getHostname(url) {
    var match = url.match(/^https?:\/\/([^/?#]+)/i);
    return match ? match[1].toLowerCase() : '';
  }

  // Check if hostname is in the permitted list
  var permittedHosts = [ 'www.pardot.com', 'www.hubspot.com' ];

  function isPermittedHost(url) {
    var hostname = getHostname(url);
    for (var i = 0; i < permittedHosts.length; i++) {
      if (hostname === permittedHosts[i]) return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  // Build query string from collected pairs
  function buildQueryString(pairs) {
    return pairs.map(function(p) {
      return encodeURIComponent(p.name) + '=' + encodeURIComponent(p.value);
    }).join('&');
  }

  // Parse existing query param names from a URL base (no fragment) into a lookup object
  function getExistingParamNames(base) {
    var existing = {};
    var qIdx = base.indexOf('?');
    if (qIdx !== -1) {
      var queryString = base.substring(qIdx + 1);
      queryString.split('&').forEach(function(part) {
        var eqIdx = part.indexOf('=');
        var paramName = eqIdx !== -1 ? part.substring(0, eqIdx) : part;
        if (paramName) {
          existing[paramName] = true;
          existing[decodeURIComponent(paramName)] = true;
        }
      });
    }
    return existing;
  }

  // Append utm params to a url, avoiding duplicates while preserving existing query params
  function decorateUrl(url, pairs) {
    if (!url || url === 'about:blank') return url;

    // Only decorate URLs from permitted hosts
    if (!isPermittedHost(url)) return url;

    var hashIdx = url.indexOf('#');
    var fragment = hashIdx !== -1 ? url.substring(hashIdx) : '';
    var base     = hashIdx !== -1 ? url.substring(0, hashIdx) : url;

    var existingParams = getExistingParamNames(base);
    var filtered = pairs.filter(function(p) {
      return !existingParams[p.name] && !existingParams[encodeURIComponent(p.name)];
    });

    if (!filtered.length) return url;
    var qIdx = base.indexOf('?');
    return base + (qIdx !== -1 ? '&' : '?') + buildQueryString(filtered) + fragment;
  }

  // Define element types and their url attributes to decorate
  var elementTargets = [
    { selector: 'iframe', attrs: ['src', 'data-src'] },
    { selector: 'a',      attrs: ['href'] },
    { selector: 'form',   attrs: ['action'] },
    { selector: 'area',   attrs: ['href'] },
    { selector: 'script', attrs: ['src'] },
    { selector: 'img',    attrs: ['src', 'data-src'] }
  ];

  // Iterate each element type and decorate matching url attributes
  for (var t = 0; t < elementTargets.length; t++) {
    var target   = elementTargets[t];
    var elements = document.querySelectorAll(target.selector);

    for (var j = 0; j < elements.length; j++) {
      var el = elements[j];

      for (var k = 0; k < target.attrs.length; k++) {
        var attr     = target.attrs[k];
        var original = el.getAttribute(attr);
        if (original) {
          var updated = decorateUrl(original, cookiePairs);
          if (updated !== original) el.setAttribute(attr, updated);
        }
      }
    }
  }

})();
</script>

tag.name: iframe populate form utm_campaign hidden field from cookie EXAMPLE

parameter.value:
<script>
function getCookie(name) {
  var cookies = document.cookie.split(';');
  for (var i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
    var cookie = cookies[i].trim();
    var eqIdx = cookie.indexOf('=');
    if (eqIdx === -1) continue;
    var cookieName = decodeURIComponent(cookie.substring(0, eqIdx).trim());
    if (cookieName === name) {
      return decodeURIComponent(cookie.substring(eqIdx + 1).trim());
    }
  }
  return null;
}
document.querySelector('input[data-sc-field-name="utm_campaign"]').value = getCookie('utm_campaign');
</script>
